_comment: Example BatchedCommentResponse — what the LLM returns for the request in sample-llm-batch-request.json. Matches BatchedCommentResponseSchema in TYPES.md §8. Demonstrates mixed success (2 ok, 1 failed) — the typical case where per-patch validation catches LLM output drift.

block.title: Decide by Q1 2027 to secure first-mover tax credits

content.text: EU industrial-decarbonization tax credits for SMR offtake expire Q4 2027, leaving a 9-month window to lock in pricing.

patch.reason: Action-oriented title; added 9-month window to quantify urgency.

content.text: Cost volatility — gas-price exposure on 60% of OPEX (€42M in 2024)
Regulatory drift — EU ETS scope-1 emissions cap tightening through 2030
Client expectations — Tier-1 customers requiring Scope-3 disclosures by 2027

patch.reason: Added the 2024 actual figure (€42M) to the first bullet.

results.error: Patch validation failed: chart.takeaway exceeds maxLength of 200.
results.rawOutput: {"op":"replace","blockId":"b3-chart-01","block":{"id":"b3-chart-01","type":"chart","chartType":"stacked-bar","title":"Projected annual OPEX by scenario","takeaway":"SMR scenario reduces OPEX by 38% by year 5, saving approximately €42M cumulatively over the period, which represents a strong business case relative to the status quo natural-gas trajectory and the increasing ETS exposure that significantly impacts the long-term economics.","data":{...}}}
results._note: The LLM produced a takeaway that exceeded the 200-char limit. The app rejects this patch and queues it for a single-comment retry with a corrective re-prompt: 'Your previous patch failed validation because the takeaway field exceeded 200 characters. Produce a shorter takeaway (≤200 chars).'

_usage_note: cachedTokens is the portion of input that hit the prompt cache. Here, ~82% of input is cached (the system prompt + schema + brand + doc context). Fresh input was the comments[] array. This is the cost-saving mechanic from D-13.

_handling_per_status.ok: Patch is shown to the consultant in the review panel (D-25) as a proposed change. Consultant clicks Accept → patch applied to DocModel and added as 'ai-proposal' entry in the comment's thread.
_handling_per_status.failed: Patch is queued for a single-comment retry with corrective re-prompt. After 2 retry attempts, the comment is shown as 'failed' in the review panel with a 'View raw output' debug action.
